calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2003 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2003 Continued To Jul-11-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am. On May 5,2003.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, and CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Plaintiff, Jacobs, Malcolm & Burt, Inc. present by counsel, Kaipo Young.
Plaintiff's witness, Chris Brazeel was sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence and supporting documents presented in court, grants default judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Baymar Transportation, Inc., as follows:
Judgment of $50,901.11, Costs $259.50, for a total of $51,160.61
Judgment signed in open court.
